source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 1. 2차 CE 인허가/Attachment 10. Clinical Evaluation/Attachment 10-5 Post Market Surveillance Report/Post Market Surveillance Report (A-PMS-004).docx

document.title: Post Market Surveillance Report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
authorityOrJurisdiction: Authorized competent authorities and notified bodies

sourceSummary.oneLine: Post Market Surveillance Report A-PMS-004 Rev.2 for the ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Intended for authorized competent authorities and notified bodies of H&abyz Co. Ltd. and used to report PMS data collection, analysis, FSCA/FSN planning, and PMCF need assessment.
keyPoints: The PMS was conducted in accordance with PMS Plan Doc. No. A-PMS-003.
The device is classified as Class IIa by Rule 16 of Annex IX, MDD 93/42/EEC as amended by Directive 2007/47/EEC.
PMS information sources included literature reviews, media searches, and experience with similar devices.
The report concluded that no additional measures such as product design change and process improvement were required.
The report states PMCF does not need to be performed because all listed PMCF trigger cases were not met.

evidence.claim: The document is a Post Market Surveillance Report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Post Market Surveillance Report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

The document was prepared, reviewed, and approved on APR/02/2021.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared Sales team Jia, Yu APR/02/2021 Review R&D Manager Lee, Dong jin APR/02/2021 Approval Quality Manager Hur, Namkyu APR/02/2021

evidence.claim: Revision 2 revised the product name on APR/02/2021.
evidence.pageTarget: Post Market Surveillance Report A-PMS-004 Revision History

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacture H&abyz Co., Ltd. 1F, 2-dong, 41-16, cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-myeon, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: The product name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector and the model name is ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Model Name ADD
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The intended use is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children, replacing film-based systems, and not for mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children. It is intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems and provide more precise case diagnosis and treatment planning on a real time basis for physicians and radiologists. Not to be used for mammography.
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Intended Use

evidence.claim: The device is classified as Class IIa under Rule 16 of Annex IX of the MDD.
evidence.evidenceText: Classification Class IIa by Rule 16 of Annex IX, MDD 93/42/EEC as amended by Directive 2007/47/EEC.
evidence.pageTarget: MDD Class IIa Medical Device Classification

evidence.claim: The PMS was conducted according to PMS Plan Doc. No. A-PMS-003.
evidence.evidenceText: This Post Market Surveillance (PMS) has been conducted in accordance with the PMS Plan (Doc. No. A-PMS-003).

evidence.claim: PMS data sources were literature reviews, media, and experience with similar devices.
evidence.evidenceText: To collect data, we selected three sources from the PMS sources listed in 'NB-MED-2.12 / 1'. 1. Literature Reviews 2. The media 3. Experience with similar devices made by the same or different manufacturer

evidence.claim: The literature search covered 2000 to 2019 and used PUBMED, European Radiology, and Medical Physics.
evidence.evidenceText: Period Covered by Search From 2000 to 2019 years Literature Source PUBMED, European Radiology, Medical Physics

evidence.claim: The media search found no applicable results.
evidence.evidenceText: We searched as keyword such as ‘Solid State X-Ray Imager’, ‘Digital Imager’, ‘Flat panel digital X-ray detector’, ‘digital detector’, ‘Flat panel detector’, ‘detector’, ‘X-ray detector’, ‘FPD’ in google and yahoo, it is not found applicable

evidence.claim: Korea, Europe, and USA adverse event or recall sources were searched on 2020.08.05.
evidence.evidenceText: Nation Search Date Korea https://emed.mfds.go.kr/popup/#!CECAL01F010 2020.08.05 Europe https://www.gov.uk/drug-device-alerts?keywords=holter+electrocardiograph&alert_type%5B%5D=devices&issued_date%5Bfrom%5D=&issued_date%5Bto%5D= 2020.08.05 USA https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cdrh/cfdocs/cfMAUDE/results.cfm 2020.08.05

evidence.claim: The Korea search found no adverse event or recall related to the Digital Flat Panel X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: There is no adverse event or recall related to the Digital Flat Panel X-ray detector in the Korea

evidence.claim: The report concluded that no additional measures such as product design change or process improvement were required.
evidence.evidenceText: As a result of the post-2020.06 market research analysis, no additional measures such as product design change and process improvement are required.

evidence.claim: If serious adverse events and accidents occur with the product, FSCA will be implemented according to MEDDEV 2.12 Post-Market Surveillance.
evidence.evidenceText: In the event of serious adverse events and an accident with our product, Field Safety Corrective Action will be implemented in accordance with MEDDEV 2.12 Post-Market Surveillance.

evidence.claim: The FSCA notice shall include risk analysis parts, FSCA reasons and information, CAPA explanation, user or distributor advice, device identifiers, unaffected-device explanation, and manufacturer or representative certification.
evidence.evidenceText: The FSCA notice shall include the following: - Relevant parts from risk analysis - Reasons and basic information for the FSCA, including analysis of possible hazards associated with the lack or defect of a device and associated with the continued use of the device - Explanation and reason of corrective and preventive action - Advice reported and taken by the user or distributor - Device/ Serial/ Lot/ Batch number range - Explain that if the lot and lot areas are taken, the other device will not be affected - Certification of manufacturer and representative (address, contact)
evidence.pageTarget: Field Safety Corrective Action Notice Content

evidence.claim: The FSN will be submitted to the competent authority before and at the same time as FSCA starts.
evidence.evidenceText: H&abyz will include a copy of the Field Safety Notice (FSN) Notice submitted to the competent authority. It will proceed before and at the same time as the FSCA is started.
But all the cases are not met to PMS activity data. So, the PMCF does not need to be performed.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority metadata is ambiguous: source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, while the document is in a CE MDD folder and cites MDD 93/42/EEC, MEDDEV 2.12, notified bodies, Korea, Europe, and USA searches.

Conflicting product evidence appears in the PMCF table: one comment states 'Our device is a product that pushes the limbs and helps the blood to circulate well,' which conflicts with the identified Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
Some extracted text has apparent quality issues or transcription artifacts, including 'Cl)4', repeated recall entries, and incomplete MAUDE redactions such as '(b)(6)' and '(b)(4)'.
The confidentiality statement refers to a 'Post Market Surveillance Plan' although the source title and content identify the document as a Post Market Surveillance Report.
